info.description: VoiceTel REST API. All resource identifiers are in the URL path. Authenticate every request with `Authorization: Bearer <apikey>`. To obtain your API key, POST `{"username": <id>, "password": "<password>"}` to /v2.2/account/api-key — this is the only endpoint that does not require an Authorization header. The response is `{"status":"success","data":{"apikey":"<32-hex-string>"}}`. Re-fetch the API key after any password change. Rate-limited endpoints: account, account/recurring-charges, account/cdr, account/api-key — 6 requests per hour per IP.
info.title: VoiceTel API

bearerAuth.description: 32-character hexadecimal API key obtained by POSTing your username and password to /v2.2/account/api-key. Pass it as the Bearer token on every request. Re-fetch after any password change.

ratingComment.description: Free-form comment that accompanies the rating.

updated.description: Fields that were successfully updated before the conflict was raised.

numberMessagingCampaignAssignData.description: Data payload for the number messaging campaign assign operation.

carrier.description: Outbound carrier id assigned to the number after binding (17 = path A, 19 = path B).

previousNetwork.description: Messaging path the number was bound to before this call — null if there was no prior binding, 'A' or 'B' if a conflict was detected.

upstreamCnpId.description: CNP ID from the CSP sharing record. SFL9UTQ = path A, SB8TWLO = path B.

network.description: Messaging path the campaign resolves to (from the CSP sharing record).

number.description: Ten-digit telephone number that was bound to the campaign.

previousNetworkCleared.description: True if a conflicting binding on the other path was successfully disabled to allow this assignment.

messageHistoryResponse.description: Message Detail Records for a number within a time range.

data.description: Payload of the message history response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the message history response operation.

orderCreateResponse.description: Result of an order. amountCharged is what was debited from the account.

data.description: Payload of the order create response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the order create response operation.

authGetData.description: Data payload for the auth get operation.

acl.description: List of CIDR ranges authorized for IP-based authentication on this account (in authGetData).

authType.description: 0=Digest, 1=IP Auth, 2=Digest OR IP Auth, 3=Digest AND IP Auth

inventoryCoverageItem.description: A single coverage bucket. Which fields are populated depends on the countBy dimension.

count.description: Number of available TNs in this bucket.

numbersListData.description: Data payload for the numbers list operation.

numberLidbData.description: Data payload for the number lidb operation.

customerOrderReference.description: Order reference used when posting to the network. Echoed from the request if supplied; auto-generated as '<username>-<unix-timestamp>' otherwise.

cnam.description: The sanitised caller name written to local cache and the routing network (max 15 alphanumeric).

carrierStatus.description: Status returned by the LIDB network. 'Success' indicates the request was accepted; other values describe the failure. Local cache is updated regardless of this field.

number.description: The number whose LIDB was updated.

threads.body: Hello, I cannot send SMS from my account.

supportConversation.description: Full support ticket record. Returned by GET /v2.2/support/tickets/{id} and POST /v2.2/support/tickets.

state.description: Lifecycle state of the ticket record itself.

preview.example: Hello, I cannot send SMS from my account…
preview.description: Short preview of the most recent customer message.

mailboxId.description: Mailbox routing — 1 for one brand, 2 for the others (see Handler_support::mailboxId).

closedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the ticket was closed.

createdBy.description: User or customer who created the ticket.

closedBy.description: User id of the staff member who closed the ticket (only set when status is closed).

folderId.description: Folder the ticket currently sits in.

number.description: Human-readable ticket number shown to the customer.

subject.description: Subject line as set by the customer or agent.

assignee.description: Staff user the ticket is currently assigned to — null if unassigned.

id.description: Ticket identifier — use as {id} in subsequent /support/tickets/{id} calls.

userUpdatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent staff update to the ticket.

status.description: Outcome of the support conversation operation.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent change to the ticket.

customFields.description: Backend-defined custom fields. Each is {id, name, value, text} where text is a humanized rendering of value.

threadsCount.description: Number of threads (messages and notes) on the ticket.

customerWaitingSince.description: How long the customer has been awaiting a reply.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the ticket was created.

closedByUser.description: Full user record for the staff member who closed the ticket.

cc.description: Default CC addresses for outbound replies.

threads.body: Hello, I cannot send SMS from my account.

example.body: Hello, I cannot send SMS from my account.

embedded.description: Related records. Currently the v2.2 ticket endpoints always request only threads on the embed.

numberRouteRequest.description: Request body for the number Route operation.

route.description: Gateway id the number is currently routed to (in numberRouteRequest).

numberForwardRequest.description: Request body for the number Forward operation.

portOutPinUpdateData.description: Data payload for the port out pin update operation.

number.description: Ten-digit telephone number whose PIN was set.

aclModifyRequest.description: Request body for the acl modify operation.

acl.description: List of CIDR ranges authorized for IP-based authentication on this account (in aclModifyRequest).

accountRecoverBadRequest.description: Request body for the account Recover Bad operation.

error.description: Error envelope for the account recover bad request operation.

status.description: Outcome of the account recover bad request operation.

numberMessagingState.description: Current messaging routing state for a single number, including the bound campaign and its CSP status if any.

carrier.description: Internal carrier identifier on the numbers row.

onAccount.description: Present and false when the number is not on the authenticated account.

routeIn.description: numbers_sms row id used for inbound routing; 0 means no route configured.

network.description: Messaging path the number is currently on. null when carrier is 0 or any non-messaging carrier.

resource.description: URL or endpoint that receives inbound messages for this routeIn.

enabled.description: Whether the number can currently send or receive messages.

upstreamCnpId.description: SFL9UTQ = path A, SB8TWLO = path B.

status.description: CSP campaign status: ACTIVE, EXPIRED, SUSPENDED, …

campaign.description: Campaign currently bound to this number, with its CSP-side status. null when no binding exists.

accountCdrResponse.description: Response wrapper for GET /v2.2/account/cdr. Returns per-call billing records that fall within the requested start/end range, newest first. Each row carries a composite key of [account, startEpoch] so the caller can paginate by time.

data.description: Payload of the account cdr response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the account cdr response operation.

portAvailabilityData.description: Data payload for the port availability operation.

losingCarrier.description: SPID/OCN of the current carrier when reported.

portable.description: True if the network reports this number can be ported in.

numberCampaignAssignRequest.description: Assign a 10DLC campaign to this number.

portDetail.description: Full detail for a single port-in record.

name.description: Name on the porting account at submission.

status.description: Outcome of the port detail operation.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp the port was submitted (schema portDetail).

numbers.description: Telephone numbers in this port order.

message.description: Free-form message from the port team (schema portDetail).

e911ValidateResponse.description: Response wrapper for POST /v2.2/e911/validations. Returns the validated address with an identifier that can be used to provision the address for a number.

data.description: Payload of the e911 validate response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the e911 validate response operation.

data.description: Payload of the messaging campaign status response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the messaging campaign status response operation.

numberFaxData.description: Data payload for the number fax operation.

e911ValidatedAddress.description: Address validation result from POST /v2.2/e911/validations. addressid is the identifier used to provision the address against a number via PUT /v2.2/e911/{dn}.

address2.description: Echoed/normalized street address line 2 — may be an empty string.

addressid.description: Upstream address identifier — pass this to PUT /v2.2/e911/{dn} to provision the address for a number.

numberFaxResponse.description: Response wrapper for the number Fax operation.

data.description: Payload of the number fax response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the number fax response operation.

cidr.description: IPv4 CIDR. Must be routable public address. Mask must be /8, /16, /24, or /32.

date.description: Timestamp the credit was applied to the account.

paid.description: Invoice fulfillment status. true = customer has paid the invoice for this credit. false = invoice is still outstanding.

numberAddRequest.description: Request body for the number Add operation.

numberMessagingPatchData.description: Data payload for the number messaging patch operation.

number.description: The ten-digit telephone number that was updated.

updated.description: Subset of {routeIn, routeOut} that the request changed.

aclAddData.description: Data payload for the acl add operation.

accountApiKeyData.description: Data payload for the account api key operation.

ports.message: Your numbers will be porting on May/04/2026 at 10:00 AM Central.

portListResponse.description: Wrapper around the user's port-in records.

data.description: Payload of the port list response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the port list response operation.

accountPutResponse.description: Response wrapper for the account Put operation.

data.description: Payload of the account put response operation.

status.description: Outcome of the account put response operation.

tags.description: Account profile, settings, billing charges, credit history, call detail records, SIP registration status, and self-service signup and password recovery.
tags.name: Account

tags.description: Manage the IP Access Control List for IP-based SIP authentication. Only routable public IPv4 CIDRs with masks /8, /16, /24, or /32 are accepted.
tags.name: ACL

tags.description: Manage the account SIP authentication type (Digest, IP Auth, or both) and password.
tags.name: Authentication

tags.description: Provision and manage e911 emergency service records for telephone numbers on the account.
tags.name: e911

tags.description: Manage SIP gateways (outbound trunks). System route types (USER, T30, VOICE_BRIDGE, DID, T38, RTC_BRIDGE, SDN) are always present and read-only.
tags.name: Gateways

tags.description: Number ordering, search, porting, and messaging campaign provisioning.
tags.name: iNumbering

tags.description: Per-lookup billed services. CNAM returns the registered Caller ID Name. LRN returns Location Routing Number and carrier details. Requires the service to be enabled on the account.
tags.name: Lookups

tags.description: SMS/MMS sending, routing, messaging campaigns, and delivery records.
tags.name: Messaging

tags.description: Manage telephone numbers: routing, forwarding, DNIS translation, inbound CNAM lookup, outbound Caller ID Name (LIDB), SMS routing, and fax-to-email.
tags.name: Numbers

tags.description: Support ticket management. Customers see only their own tickets. Administrators see all tickets.
tags.name: Support

delete.description: Removes a gateway. Will fail if DIDs are currently routed to it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Resource identifier — used by gateways delete.

204.description: No Content response from gateways delete.

404.description: Not Found response from gateways delete.

409.description: Cannot remove — DIDs still routed to it

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Resource identifier — used by gateways put.

404.description: Not Found response from gateways put.

get.description: Gateways get on /v2.2/gateways/{id}.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Resource identifier — used by gateways get.

404.description: Not Found response from gateways get.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Resource identifier — used by support ticket messages.

403.description: Forbidden response from support ticket messages.

404.description: Ticket not found (support ticket messages).

messages.body: Hello, I cannot send SMS from my account.

200.description: OK response from support ticket messages.

post.description: Places an the number order for the listed numbers and adds them to the authenticated account. Charges accounts.cash by accounts.did × len(numbers). Supports the Idempotency-Key header for safe retries (the cached response is returned for 24h on replay).

requestBody.description: Numbers to order. Each may set an optional route (gateway_id on this account, default 4).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied opaque token. Retries with the same key return the cached response and do NOT re-charge or re-order.

402.description: accounts.cash insufficient for the order total

400.description: Validation failed before any carrier or DB write

502.description: the network rejected the order; no DB writes performed

delete.description: Permanently removes the number from the account. Numbers currently porting cannot be removed.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number — used by numbers delete.

204.description: No Content response from numbers delete.

404.description: Not Found response from numbers delete.

patch.description: Reassigns the number from the authenticated account to the destination accountId on the given route. Both fields are required.

requestBody.description: Destination account and the route on that account that should receive the number.

patch.summary: Move a number to another account

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number currently on the authenticated account.

404.description: Number is not on the authenticated account (PATCH /v2.2/numbers/{number}).

409.description: Move failed due to a conflict (e.g. simultaneous update)

400.description: Missing required field or invalid route

parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number — used by numbers route.

parameters.name: locState
parameters.description: Filter: state or province code (e.g. NJ).

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Filter: city name.

parameters.name: rcAbbre
parameters.description: Filter: rate-center abbreviation.

parameters.name: npa
parameters.description: Filter: area code.

parameters.name: lata
parameters.description: Filter: LATA code.

post.description: Submits a number port-in. Replicates the legacy LNP web form: creates a port record, opens a support ticket, notifies the LNP team, and deducts $6 per TN from accounts.cash. Numbers must have been confirmed portable via GET /v2.2/ports/availability/{number} within the prior hour. The LOA must be uploaded after submission.

requestBody.description: Address, account, and TN list for the port-in submission.

data.message: Port request a3a2a submitted. Please complete the LOA to proceed.

201.description: Port record created and support ticket opened

400.description: Validation failed before any side effect

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number to check.

get.description: Returns the Caller ID Name registered for the given 10-digit telephone number. Billed per lookup. Requires CNAM service to be enabled.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: 10-digit telephone number in NPANXXXXXX format.

402.description: Service not enabled or insufficient balance

put.description: Sets the outbound Caller ID Name (CNAM/LIDB) for the number. Writes the name to the local cache (used by the softswitch for outbound caller-id) and then submits the update to the LIDB network. The local cache update is durable; a downstream failure is reported via the response's carrierStatus field but does not fail the request. Max 15 alphanumeric characters.

requestBody.description: Body for set outbound caller id name (lidb).

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number — used by numbers lidb.

404.description: Number not found or not on this account (numbers forward remove).

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token (numbers forward remove).

400.description: Field Required: cnam (outbound caller name, max 15 alphanumeric characters).

parameters.name: number

put.description: Updates the account authentication type and/or password.

errors.message: Must be 6-10 alphanumeric characters with at least one letter and one number

get.description: Returns the current authentication type, its description, and all IP ACL entries for the account.

delete.description: Removes each listed number from the given campaign. The campaign itself is unchanged; only the number-to-campaign bindings are removed. campaignId is required — the system uses CSP sharing to resolve which messaging path holds the bindings, then issues path-appropriate removal calls.
delete.summary: Unassign multiple numbers from a campaign

parameters.name: numbers
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of 10-digit telephone numbers to remove from the campaign. Maximum 1000.

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: TCR campaign id the numbers are being removed from. The network is resolved via CSP sharing.

409.description: Campaign is not on a supported messaging path

get.description: Returns the current SIP URI and user agent for the registered device.

404.description: Not registered

post.description: Validates the address and provisions an e911 record for the given dn. dn must be a 10-digit telephone number owned by the authenticated account.

requestBody.description: e911 record details. The dn field identifies which number this record applies to.

get.description: Returns the complete credit history for the account — all credits regardless of invoice status. Each entry includes a paid flag: true means the customer has fulfilled the invoice; false means the invoice is still outstanding. Use /v2.2/account/credits/paid or /v2.2/account/credits/unpaid to retrieve a filtered subset.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter results to credit entries with the given paid/unpaid state.

404.description: Ticket not found (support ticket reply).

401.description: Account row not found (support ticket reply).

get.description: Returns the Location Routing Number (LRN) and carrier details for the destination number. Billed per lookup.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Destination number in NPANXXXXXX format.

parameters.name: ani
parameters.description: Calling party (ANI) in NPANXXXXXX format.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token (cnam lookup).

400.description: Destination or ANI missing from path.

post.description: Returns the current API key for the account identified by username and password. No Bearer token is required or accepted — credentials must be provided in the request body. Rate limited to 6 requests per hour per IP.

put.description: Sets the inbound DNIS translation for the number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number — used by numbers translation.

404.description: Number not found or not on this account (numbers sms delete).

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token (numbers sms delete).

delete.description: Removes one or more IPv4 CIDR blocks from the IP-ACL. CIDRs are passed as a comma-separated `cidrs` query string parameter.

parameters.name: cidrs
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of CIDR blocks to remove from the ACL (e.g. 203.0.113.0/24,203.0.113.1/32).

409.description: One or more entries could not be removed

post.description: Adds one or more IPv4 CIDR blocks. Only routable public addresses accepted. Mask must be /8, /16, /24, or /32.

requestBody.description: Body for add ip acl entries.

409.description: One or more entries could not be added

get.description: Returns all IP CIDR blocks on the account IP authentication ACL.

404.description: No entries found

post.description: Sends a text message. If mediaUrls is provided it goes as MMS via the messaging network; otherwise SMS via the SMS routing routed by the source number's assigned network. Charges the account on success.

requestBody.description: Source number, destination, and message text. Add mediaUrls to send MMS.

400.description: Required field missing or malformed (message send).

502.description: Messaging gateway returned an unexpected response

403.description: Source number is not on the authenticated account

409.description: Messaging not enabled on this account, this number, or the recipient has opted out

get.description: Returns SMS or MMS Message Detail Records for a single number within a timestamp range. Both endpoints of the range are inclusive.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: sms (default), mms, or dlr. dlr returns delivery status events for sent messages.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number on the authenticated account — used by message history.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Unix timestamp range start (newer). Defaults to now.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Unix timestamp range end (older). Defaults to 24h ago.

post.description: Validates a street address for e911 provisioning. Returns the validated address including an addressid for use with PUT /e911/{dn}.

requestBody.description: Body for validate an e911 address.

patch.description: At least one of routeIn / routeOut must be present. routeIn must be a numbers_sms row id owned by the authenticated account, or 0 to detach.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number on the authenticated account — used by number messaging patch.

403.description: routeIn does not belong to this account

404.description: Not Found response from number messaging patch.

get.description: Returns the current inbound route, outbound carrier, and enabled state for this number.
get.summary: Read messaging state for one number

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Ten-digit telephone number on the authenticated account — used by number messaging get.

404.description: Not Found response from number messaging get.

get.description: Returns up to `quantity` numbers matching the tnMask and optional filters. Results are cached for 10 minutes.

parameters.name: tnMask
parameters.description: Prefix or wildcard pattern; `201`, `201555`, `201555*`.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Maximum results, 1–1000. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: province
parameters.description: Limit results to this 2-letter US state or Canadian province code.

parameters.name: rateCenter
parameters.description: Rate-center name.

parameters.name: lata
parameters.description: LATA code (query filter).

502.description: Network did not return a usable response
